requirements.full_sentence:
If not managed effectively, credit risk may have ramifications for a range
of other risk categories too.
requirements.object: range of other risk categories too

requirements.full_sentence:
These Directions shall be called the Reserve Bank of India (Urban Co-operative
Banks - Credit Risk Management) Directions, 2025.
requirements.object: Bank of India (Urban Co-operative Banks - Credit Risk Management) Directions, 2025

requirements.full_sentence: These Directions shall come into effect immediately upon issuance.
requirements.object: upon issuance

requirements.full_sentence:
These Directions shall be applicable to Urban Co-operative Banks (hereinafter
collectively referred to as 'UCBs' and individually as an 'UCB').
requirements.object: Co-operative Banks (hereinafter collectively referred to as 'UCBs' and individually as an 'UCB')

requirements.full_sentence:
In this context, urban co-operative banks shall mean Primary Co-operative Banks
as defined under section 5(ccv) read with Section 56 of Banking Regulation Act,
1949.
requirements.object: as defined under section 5(ccv) read with Section 56 of Banking Regulation Act, 1949

requirements.full_sentence:
(i) 'Bank Guarantee' shall mean financial and performance guarantees issued by
banks on behalf of their clients.
requirements.object: guarantees issued by banks on behalf of their clients

requirements.full_sentence:
(ii) 'Bills Purchased and Discounted' shall mean negotiable instruments that give the
holder the right to receive stated fixed sums on demand or at a fixed or
determinable future time.
requirements.object: give the holder the right to receive stated fixed sums on demand or at a fixed or determinable future time

requirements.full_sentence:
(iii) 'Cash credit' shall mean a facility, under which a customer is allowed an advance
up to the credit limit against the security by way of hypothecation / pledge of goods,
book debts, standing crops, etc.
requirements.object: which a customer is allowed an advance up to the credit limit against the security by way of hypothecation / pledge of goods, b

requirements.full_sentence:
1[(iiia) Contract or arrangement' shall have the same meaning as specified in Section
188(1)(a) to (g) of the Companies Act, 2013.
requirements.object: as specified in Section 188(1)(a) to (g) of the Companies Act, 2013

requirements.full_sentence:
(iiib) Control' shall have the same meaning as assigned to it under Section 2(27) of the
Companies Act, 2013.]
1Inserted with effect from April 01, 2026 vide Reserve Bank of India (Urban Co-operative Banks - Credit Risk Management) - Amendment Directions, 2026 dated January 05, 2026.
requirements.object: as assigned to it under Section 2(27) of the Companies Act, 2013

requirements.full_sentence:
(iv) 'Current Account' shall mean a form of demand deposit account wherefrom
withdrawals are allowed any number of times depending upon the balance in the
account or up to a particular agreed amount and shall also be deemed to include
other deposit accounts which are neither Savings nor Term deposit account.
requirements.object: demand deposit account wherefrom withdrawals are allowed any number of times depending upon the balance in the account or up to a parti

requirements.full_sentence:
2[(iva) 'Director of a UCB' shall have the same meaning as defined in Explanation (b) to
Section 20 of the Banking Regulation Act 1949 and would include a nominee
director, an independent director, and a member of the Board of Management
(BoM).
requirements.object: as defined in Explanation (b) to Section 20 of the Banking Regulation Act 1949 and would include a nominee director, an independ

requirements.full_sentence: (ivb) 'Entity' shall mean a 'person' other than an individual and a Hindu Undivided Family.
requirements.object: than an individual and a Hindu Undivided Family

requirements.full_sentence:
(ivc) 'Key Managerial Personnel (KMP)' of a UCB shall mean all employees one level
below the Board and any person designated as such by the Board.
requirements.object: level below the Board and any person designated as such by the Board

requirements.full_sentence:
(ivd) 'Lending' in the context of a related party shall mean extending funded or / and non-
fund-based credit facilities to related parties.
requirements.object: / and non- fund-based credit facilities to related parties

requirements.full_sentence:
While investments in debt instruments
of related parties shall be covered for this purpose, equity investments shall be
excluded.]
requirements.object: purpose, equity investments shall be excluded

requirements.full_sentence:
(v) 'Major shareholder' shall mean a person holding 10 per cent or more of the paid-
up share capital.
requirements.object: 10 per cent or more of the paid- up share capital

requirements.full_sentence:
(vi) 'Overdraft' shall mean a facility, under which a customer is allowed to draw an
agreed sum (credit limit) in excess of credit balance in their account.
requirements.object: which a customer is allowed to draw an agreed sum (credit limit) in excess of credit balance in their account

requirements.full_sentence:
The overdraft
facility may be secured (against fixed / term deposits and other securities, like
small saving instruments, surrender value of insurance policies, etc.) or clean (i.e.
requirements.object: / term deposits and other securities, like small saving instruments, surrender value of insurance policies, etc

requirements.full_sentence:
<image>
3[(via) 'Person' shall have the same meaning as assigned to it under Section 3 (23) of
requirements.object: as assigned to it under Section 3 (23) of

requirements.full_sentence:
(vib) 'Personal Loan' shall have the same meaning as defined under Banking Statistics
(Harmonised Definitions).
requirements.object: as defined under Banking Statistics (Harmonised Definitions)

requirements.full_sentence:
(vic) 'Promoter' shall have shall have the same meaning as assigned to it under Section
2(69) of the Companies Act, 2013.
requirements.object: same meaning as assigned to it under Section 2(69) of the Companies Act, 2013

requirements.full_sentence:
(vid) 'Reciprocally Related Person' means an individual who is either (a) a director
(excluding independent director/ nominee director appointed by the Government
or RBI or a statutory body) of another Co-operative bank or (b) a member of Board
of Management of another Co-operative bank or (c) relatives of such directors /
BoM members or (d) firms / companies in which such directors / BoM members
have interest / substantial interest.
requirements.object: either (a) a director (excluding independent director/ nominee director appointed by the Government or RBI or a statutory body) o

requirements.full_sentence:
(vie) 'Related Party' with respect to a UCB shall mean a related person, a reciprocally
related person, or any of the following entities:
requirements.object: a reciprocally related person, or any of the following entities:

requirements.full_sentence:
Provided that, nothing in sub-clause (e) above shall apply in cases where the authority to
nominate a director arises exclusively from a lending or financing arrangement.
requirements.object: the authority to nominate a director arises exclusively from a lending or financing arrangement

requirements.full_sentence:
Provided further that, nothing in sub-clause (f) above shall apply to the advice, directions
or instructions given in a professional capacity.
requirements.object: directions or instructions given in a professional capacity

requirements.full_sentence:
(vif) 'Related Person' with respect to a UCB shall mean a person, and the relatives of
such a person, where the person:
requirements.object: the relatives of such a person

requirements.full_sentence:
(vii) 4['Relative' with regard to a natural person shall have the same meaning as defined
in Section 2(77) of the Companies Act, 2013 and rules framed therein.]
4Substituted with effect from April 01, 2026 vide Reserve Bank of India (Urban Co-operative Banks - Credit Risk Management) - Amendment Directions, 2026 dated January 05, 2026.
requirements.object: as defined in Section 2(77) of the Companies Act, 2013 and rules framed therein

requirements.full_sentence:
(viii) 'Revaluation Reserve' shall mean a reserve created on the revaluation of assets
or net assets represented by the surplus of the estimated replacement cost or
estimated market values over the book values thereof.
requirements.object: on the revaluation of assets or net assets represented by the surplus of the estimated replacement cost or estimated market val

requirements.full_sentence:
(ix) 'Substantial interest' shall have the same meaning as assigned to it in Section
5(ne) of the Banking Regulation Act, 1949.
requirements.object: as assigned to it in Section 5(ne) of the Banking Regulation Act, 1949

requirements.full_sentence:
(2) All other expressions unless defined herein shall have the same meaning as have
been assigned to them under the Banking Regulation Act, 1949, or the Reserve Bank of
India Act, 1934 and rules / regulations made thereunder, or any statutory modification or
re-enactment thereto or in other relevant regulations issued by the Reserve Bank or
Glossary of Terms published by Reserve Bank or as used in commercial parlance, as the
case may be.
requirements.object: as have been assigned to them under the Banking Regulation Act, 1949, or the Reserve Bank of India Act, 1934 and rules / regulat

requirements.full_sentence:
6[A UCB shall put in place a comprehensive Board approved policy on Credit Risk
Management.
requirements.object: comprehensive Board approved policy on Credit Risk Management

requirements.full_sentence:
The policy shall, inter alia, cover aspects related to lending to related
parties, valuation of properties including empanelment of valuers, and review /
renewal of credit facilities.
requirements.object: aspects related to lending to related parties, valuation of properties including empanelment of valuers, and review / renewal of c

requirements.full_sentence:
In order to ensure that the loan policy of the bank reflects approved internal risk
appetite and remains in alignment with the extant regulations, it shall be reviewed
by the Board at least once in a financial year.
requirements.object: Board at least once in a financial year

requirements.full_sentence:
Credit assessments carried out by a bank shall suitably factor in the possible impact of calamities on borrowers who may be impacted by such events.]
7 Inserted with effect from July 01, 2026 vide Reserve Bank of India (Urban Cooperative Banks - Credit Risk Management) Second Amendment Directions, 2026 dated April 29, 2026.
requirements.object: possible impact of calamities on borrowers who may be impacted by such events

requirements.full_sentence:
In terms of Section 20(1)(b) of the Banking Regulation Act, 1949, read with Section
56 of the Act ibid, banks are prohibited from entering into any commitment for
granting any loans or advances to or on behalf of:
(1) any of its directors;
requirements.object: commitment for granting any loans or advances to or on behalf of: (1) any of its directors
facility on or after its contracted maturity or renewal date

requirements.full_sentence:
Provided that, the credit facilities mentioned at sub-paras (iv), (v), and (vi) above shall be
subject to the prudential ceilings and norms prescribed for various loans to individuals
in Reserve Bank of India (Urban Co-operative Banks - Credit Facilities) Directions,
2025 and Reserve Bank of India (Urban Co-operative Banks - Concentration Risk
Management) Directions, 2025.
requirements.object: prudential ceilings and norms prescribed for various loans to individuals in Reserve Bank of India (Urban Co-operative Banks - Credi

requirements.full_sentence:
Provided further that, purpose of loans mentioned at sub-paras (iv), (v), and (vi) above
shall not be for investment in financial assets and the interest rate charged on all such
loans shall not be lower than the rate charged to the employees.
requirements.object: financial assets and the interest rate charged on all such loans shall not be lower than the rate charged to the employees

requirements.full_sentence:
(vii) Non-Fund Based (NFB) facility on behalf of a director or his / her related party,
provided that all such facilities shall be fully secured by cash collateral of equivalent or
higher value.
requirements.object: cash collateral of equivalent or higher value

requirements.full_sentence:
Provided that, cash collateral would not be mandatory in exposure arising on account of
derivative transactions.
requirements.object: not be mandatory in exposure arising on account of derivative transactions

requirements.full_sentence:
In terms of Section 20A(2) read with Section 56 of the BR Act, 1949, any remission
made in contravention of the provisions of sub-section (1) above shall be void and of
no effect.
requirements.object: no effect

requirements.full_sentence:
The Board shall have the overall responsibility of ensuring that suitable mechanisms
are put in place for implementation of the policy on lending to related parties by the
bank.
requirements.object: of ensuring that suitable mechanisms are put in place for implementation of the policy on lending to related parties b

requirements.full_sentence:
The credit policy (hereinafter called the policy) of a bank, as required in terms of the
extant directions, shall contain specific provisions relating to 'lending to related
parties' in accordance with the provisions of these Directions.
requirements.object: to 'lending to related parties' in accordance with the provisions of these Directions

requirements.full_sentence:
The policy shall
prescribe, inter alia, additional safeguards to address the risks emanating from
lending to related parties.
requirements.object: safeguards to address the risks emanating from lending to related parties

requirements.full_sentence:
The policy shall also have specific provisions for lending to 'specified employees' of
the bank and their relatives.
requirements.object: for lending to 'specified employees' of the bank and their relatives
of the whistleblowing mechanism, encourage employees to communicate confidentially and without the risk of reprisal, legitimate concerns

requirements.full_sentence: The policy shall specify aggregate limits for loans towards related parties.
requirements.object: loans towards related parties

requirements.full_sentence:
Within this
aggregate limit, there shall be sub-limits for loans to a single related party and a
group of related parties.
requirements.object: to a single related party and a group of related parties

requirements.full_sentence:
These limits shall be within the extant prudential exposure
limits prescribed by the Reserve Bank.
requirements.object: prudential exposure limits prescribed by the Reserve Bank

requirements.full_sentence:
UCBs categorised under Tier I, Tier II, and Tier III shall not undertake any lending
transaction with the relatives of directors except credit facility fully secured by
government securities, life insurance policies or fixed deposit standing in their own
name.
requirements.object: with the relatives of directors except credit facility fully secured by government securities, life insurance polici

requirements.full_sentence:
UCBs categorised under Tier I, Tier II and Tier III shall not undertake any lending
transaction with the firms / companies / concerns, as well as subsidiaries / holding
companies thereof, in which the relatives of directors are interested, or have given
surety / guarantee or hold substantial interest, or is in control of the company / firm.
requirements.object: with the firms / companies / concerns, as well as subsidiaries / holding companies thereof, in which the relatives o

requirements.full_sentence:
Loans to related parties, which are not prohibited in terms of provisions of Chapter
III and Chapter IV of these Directions, or which have been permitted under power
exercised by the Reserve Bank under clause (a) of the Explanation under Section
20(4) of the Banking Regulation Act, 1949, except credit facilities fully secured by
cash or liquid securities, shall be subject to a materiality threshold as per the credit
policy of the UCB, which shall not be higher than the following ceilings:
UCB Tier Materiality Threshold Ceilings
Tier 1 ₹10 lakh
Tier 2 ₹25 lakh
Tier 3 ₹75 lakh
Tier 4 ₹1 crore
14J.
requirements.object: following ceilings: UCB Tier Materiality Threshold Ceilings Tier 1 ₹10 lakh Tier 2 ₹25 lakh Tier 3 ₹75 lakh Tier 4 ₹1 crore 14J

requirements.full_sentence:
Materiality thresholds may vary for different categories of loans to related parties as
per the UCB's policy.
requirements.object: of loans to related parties as per the UCB's policy

requirements.full_sentence:
All loans above the prescribed materiality threshold shall be sanctioned by Board
of the UCB.
requirements.object: of the UCB

requirements.full_sentence:
Directors, KMP, or 'specified employees' shall recuse themselves from deliberations
and decision on loan proposals, or contracts and arrangements, involving
themselves or their related parties.
requirements.object: and decision on loan proposals, or contracts and arrangements, involving themselves or their related parties

requirements.full_sentence:
Such recusal shall also extend to deliberations
and decisions relating to any subsequent material changes to the terms of such
loans, including one-time settlements, write-offs, waivers, enforcement of security,
implementation of resolution plans, etc.
requirements.object: and decisions relating to any subsequent material changes to the terms of such loans, including one-time settlements, wri

requirements.full_sentence:
UCB shall put in place a suitable mechanism for maintaining and periodically
updating the list of all the related persons, and the related parties thereof, as well
as the loan sanctioned by the bank to such related persons and related parties.
requirements.object: suitable mechanism for maintaining and periodically updating the list of all the related persons, and the related parties thereof, as w

requirements.full_sentence:
Periodic reviews shall be conducted at quarterly or shorter intervals by internal
auditors to check, inter alia, whether guidelines and procedures in relation to loans
to related parties are being adhered to or not.
requirements.object: or shorter intervals by internal auditors to check, inter alia, whether guidelines and procedures in relation to loans to re

requirements.full_sentence:
Any deviation from the policy relating to lending to related parties and reasons
therefor shall be reported to the Audit Committee of the Board.
requirements.object: Audit Committee of the Board

requirements.full_sentence:
Any product, entity or structure formed with the objective of circumventing these
Directions through various means, such as reciprocal lending or quid pro quo
arrangements, and identified as such by the auditors of the bank or by the
supervisory authority and investigating agencies shall always be treated as lending
to related party.
requirements.object: lending to related party

requirements.full_sentence:
Any non-compliance with and circumvention of these Directions shall result in
supervisory and enforcement actions as deemed appropriate by the Reserve
<image>
Bank.
requirements.object: enforcement actions as deemed appropriate by the Reserve <image> Bank

requirements.full_sentence:
These actions may include imposition of monetary penalty, requirement of
full provisioning, directions to conduct staff accountability exercises, forensic
audits, and restrictions or any other supervisory and enforcement actions as
deemed fit.]
requirements.object: penalty, requirement of full provisioning, directions to conduct staff accountability exercises, forensic audits, and r

requirements.full_sentence:
In the
circumstances, a UCB shall safeguard their interest vis-à-vis such statutory dues.
requirements.object: such statutory dues

requirements.full_sentence:
Therefore, a UCB shall satisfy themselves that there are no arrears of Provident Fund
and other statutory dues of the borrowers by obtaining a declaration from them that
all such dues have been duly paid.
requirements.object: are no arrears of Provident Fund and other statutory dues of the borrowers by obtaining a declaration from them that all

requirements.full_sentence:
Proof in this regard may be called for only in cases
where banks have reason to doubt the borrowers' declaration.
requirements.object: in cases where banks have reason to doubt the borrowers' declaration

requirements.full_sentence:
production of a receipt evidencing the payment of the dues or a
certificate from the auditors of the borrower or any other similar proof may be
considered sufficient.

conditions:
where there are arrears for
reasons beyond the control of the borrowers
requirements.full_sentence:
In the case of stressed borrowers where there are arrears for
reasons beyond the control of the borrowers, banks may continue to consider such
cases on merits.
requirements.object: cases on merits

requirements.full_sentence:
A UCB shall ensure that borrowers enjoying credit facilities, pay the provident fund
payments and similar other statutory dues promptly.
requirements.object: credit facilities, pay the provident fund payments and similar other statutory dues promptly

requirements.full_sentence:
Apart from insisting on the borrowers to indicate a
definite programme for clearance of arrears, a UCB shall consider suitable restrictions
on the outflow of funds.
requirements.object: the outflow of funds

requirements.full_sentence:
A UCB shall incorporate an appropriate declaration in their
application forms for grant / renewal / enhancement of credit facilities so as to ensure
<image>
that the position regarding the statutory dues is disclosed therein.
requirements.object: in their application forms for grant / renewal / enhancement of credit facilities so as to ensure <image> that

requirements.full_sentence:
In respect of the
corporate borrowers and non-corporate borrowers, the amount of statutory dues shall
normally be reflected in their audited annual accounts.
requirements.object: their audited annual accounts

conditions:
In case audited accounts do
not indicate the position clearly
requirements.full_sentence:
In case audited accounts do
not indicate the position clearly, a certificate shall be obtained from the Chartered
Accountant for this purpose.
requirements.object: Chartered Accountant for this purpose

requirements.full_sentence:
A UCB shall not finance a borrower already availing credit facility from another
bank without obtaining a 'No Objection Certificate' from the existing financing
bank.
requirements.object: availing credit facility from another bank without obtaining a 'No Objection Certificate' from the existing financing bank
financial statements from the borrowers enjoying large limits

requirements.full_sentence:
A UCB shall take suitable precautions to avoid irregular practices such as
sanctioning advances beyond discretionary powers and / or without proper credit
appraisal in order to minimise chances of frauds.
requirements.object: avoid irregular practices such as sanctioning advances beyond discretionary powers and / or without proper credit apprais

requirements.full_sentence:
(1) The Board of Directors shall delegate specific powers to the Branch Managers
and other functionaries at the Head Office level as also to the Chairman in the
matter of sanction of advances and expenditure.
requirements.object: the Branch Managers and other functionaries at the Head Office level as also to the Chairman in the matter of sanction of

requirements.full_sentence:
A system shall also be
introduced to ensure that powers are exercised within the limits prescribed and
any transgressions are immediately reported to Head Office.
requirements.object: ensure that powers are exercised within the limits prescribed and any transgressions are immediately reported to Head Office

requirements.full_sentence:
(2) The internal inspectors shall examine during the course of inspection of
branches whether powers have been exercised properly and any unauthorised
exercise of powers shall immediately be brought to the notice of Head Office.
requirements.object: of inspection of branches whether powers have been exercised properly and any unauthorised exercise of powers shall immediat

requirements.full_sentence:
Similarly, sanctions beyond discretionary powers by the Chairman, Chief
Executive Officer and other executives at the Head Office shall also be reported
to the Board of Directors.
requirements.object: the Board of Directors

requirements.full_sentence:
The higher authorities at various levels shall desist from the unhealthy practice
of conveying sanction of advances orally or on telephone.
requirements.object: practice of conveying sanction of advances orally or on telephone

requirements.full_sentence:
(1) Only in exigencies, where sanctions are made on telephone / oral instructions
of higher functionaries or sanctions beyond discretionary powers have to be
resorted to, the following steps shall be taken:

(i) Record of such instructions / sanctions shall be maintained by the
sanctioning / disbursing authorities explaining the circumstances under
which sanctions were made.
requirements.object: sanctioning / disbursing authorities explaining the circumstances under which sanctions were made

requirements.full_sentence:
(ii) Written confirmation of the competent sanctioning authority shall be
obtained by the disbursing authority / official within a week / fortnight.
requirements.object: disbursing authority / official within a week / fortnight

requirements.full_sentence:
(iii) Sanctions within discretionary powers shall also be reported to Head
Office within a stipulated time and Head Office shall meticulously follow
up receipt of such returns.
requirements.object: Head Office within a stipulated time and Head Office shall meticulously follow up receipt of such returns

requirements.full_sentence:
(iv) Head Office shall diligently scrutinise the statements / returns and shall
initiate stringent action against erring functionary(s) if they are found to
<image>
have indulged in unauthorised sanctioning.
requirements.object: / returns and shall initiate stringent action against erring functionary(s) if they are found to <image> have ind

requirements.full_sentence:
(2) Officials shall exercise powers delegated to them judiciously and shall not
exceed their discretionary powers for granting loans and advances.
requirements.object: for granting loans and advances

requirements.full_sentence:
Violations, if
any, in this regard shall be viewed seriously and the guilty shall be punished
suitably.
requirements.object: the guilty shall be punished suitably

requirements.full_sentence:
(2) Post sanction follow-up of loans and advances shall be effective so as to
ensure that the security obtained from borrowers by way of hypothecation,
pledge, etc.
requirements.object: to ensure that the security obtained from borrowers by way of hypothecation, pledge, etc

requirements.full_sentence:
(3) Accounts showing sign of turning into NPAs: A UCB shall put in place more
stringent safeguards, especially where accounts show sign of turning into
NPAs.
requirements.object: stringent safeguards, especially where accounts show sign of turning into NPAs

requirements.full_sentence:
In such cases, the UCB shall strengthen their monitoring system by
resorting to more frequent inspections of borrowers' godowns, ensuring that
sale proceeds are routed through the borrower's accounts maintained with
the UCB and insisting on pledge of the stock in place of hypothecation.
requirements.object: by resorting to more frequent inspections of borrowers' godowns, ensuring that sale proceeds are routed through the

requirements.full_sentence:
(4) Drawals against clearing cheques shall be sanctioned only in respect of first
class customers and even in such cases the extent of limits and the need
therefore shall be subjected to thorough scrutiny and periodic review.
requirements.object: respect of first class customers and even in such cases the extent of limits and the need therefore shall be subjected to thorou

requirements.full_sentence:
A UCB
shall not issue banker's cheques / pay orders / demand drafts against
instruments presented for clearing, (unless the proceeds thereof are collected
and credited to the account of the party) or to borrowers whose accounts are
already overdrawn or likely to be overdrawn with the issue of such
instruments.
requirements.object: pay orders / demand drafts against instruments presented for clearing, (unless the proceeds thereof are collected and credite

requirements.full_sentence:
<image>
(5) Drawals against clearing instruments shall be normally confined to bank
drafts and Government cheques and only to a limited extent against third
party cheques.
requirements.object: bank drafts and Government cheques and only to a limited extent against third party cheques

requirements.full_sentence:
(6) Cheques against which drawals are allowed, shall represent genuine trade
transactions and strict vigilance shall be observed against assisting kite-flying
operations.
requirements.object: and strict vigilance shall be observed against assisting kite-flying operations

requirements.full_sentence:
A UCB shall, therefore, take appropriate steps to
review and tighten their internal administration and control measures so as to
eliminate the scope for misuse / diversion of funds and malpractices.
requirements.object: steps to review and tighten their internal administration and control measures so as to eliminate the scope for misuse /

requirements.full_sentence:
(2) A UCB shall take serious view of instances of misuse of power, corruption
and other malpractices indulged by the members of staff and erring staff
members shall be given punishments befitting the seriousness of the
irregularity.
requirements.object: instances of misuse of power, corruption and other malpractices indulged by the members of staff and erring staff members shall b

requirements.full_sentence:
the review shall specifically attempt to make an assessment of the
working capital requirements of the borrower based on the latest data available,
whether limits continue to be within the need-based requirements and according
to the UCB's prescribed lending norms.
requirements.object: an assessment of the working capital requirements of the borrower based on the latest data available, whether limits cont

requirements.full_sentence: A UCB shall have a mechanism for proper monitoring of the end use of funds.
requirements.object: proper monitoring of the end use of funds

requirements.full_sentence:
Wherever diversion is observed, it shall take appropriate action including
<image>
recalling the loans, reduction of sanctioned limits, imposing penal charges etc.
requirements.object: <image> recalling the loans, reduction of sanctioned limits, imposing penal charges etc

requirements.full_sentence:
A UCB shall keep a proper vigil over requests of their clients
for cash withdrawals from their accounts for large amounts.
requirements.object: over requests of their clients for cash withdrawals from their accounts for large amounts

requirements.full_sentence:
Whenever stocks
under hypothecation to cash credit and other loan accounts are found to have
been sold but the proceeds thereof not credited to the loan account, such action
shall normally be treated as a fraud.
requirements.object: a fraud

requirements.full_sentence:
In such cases, the UCB shall take
immediate steps to secure the remaining stock so as to prevent further erosion
in the value of the available security as also other action as warranted.
requirements.object: secure the remaining stock so as to prevent further erosion in the value of the available security as also other action as war

conditions:
if any funds borrowed
are utilised for purposes unrelated to the operations of the borrower
requirements.full_sentence:
Siphoning of funds shall be construed to have occurred if any funds borrowed
are utilised for purposes unrelated to the operations of the borrower, to the
detriment of the financial health of the entity or of the lender.
requirements.object: occurred if any funds borrowed are utilised for purposes unrelated to the operations of the borrower, to the detriment of the fin

requirements.full_sentence:
In cases of project financing, a UCB shall seek to ensure end use of funds by, inter
alia, obtaining certification from the Chartered Accountants for the purpose.
requirements.object: use of funds by, inter alia, obtaining certification from the Chartered Accountants for the purpose

requirements.full_sentence:
In
case of short-term corporate / clean loans, such an approach ought to be
supplemented by 'due diligence' on the part of lenders themselves, and to the
extent possible, such loans shall be limited to only those borrowers whose
integrity and reliability were above board.
requirements.object: those borrowers whose integrity and reliability were above board

requirements.full_sentence:
A UCB, therefore, shall not depend
entirely on the certificates issued by the Chartered Accountants but strengthen
their internal controls and the credit risk management system to enhance the
quality of their loan portfolio.
requirements.object: certificates issued by the Chartered Accountants but strengthen their internal controls and the credit risk management system t

requirements.full_sentence:
Needless to say, ensuring end-use of funds by a
UCB shall form a part of their loan policy document for which appropriate
measures shall be put in place.
requirements.object: their loan policy document for which appropriate measures shall be put in place

requirements.full_sentence:
A UCB may, at its discretion, implement the following illustrative best practices
observed in well-managed banks regarding Management of NPAs and may put
in place any other practices which would result in better customer service and
business development:
(1) Frame reasonably well documented loan policy and rules;
requirements.object: implement the following illustrative best practices observed in well-managed banks regarding Management of NPAs and may put in pl

requirements.full_sentence:
It is advised that a UCB shall ensure that non-individual borrowers with aggregate
exposure of ₹5 crore and above from banks (Scheduled Commercial Banks
(excluding Regional Rural Banks), Local Area Banks, Small Finance Banks, and
Primary (Urban) Co-operative Banks) and Financial Institutions (All India Financial
Institutions and NBFCs (including HFCs)) obtain LEI codes.
requirements.object: with aggregate exposure of ₹5 crore and above from banks (Scheduled Commercial Banks (excluding Regional Rural Ba

requirements.full_sentence:
Explanation: 'Exposure' for this purpose shall include all fund based and non-fund
based (credit as well as investment) exposure of banks / FIs to the borrower.
requirements.object: and non-fund based (credit as well as investment) exposure of banks / FIs to the borrower

requirements.full_sentence:
Aggregate sanctioned limit or outstanding balance, whichever is higher, shall be
reckoned for the purpose.
requirements.object: purpose

requirements.full_sentence:
Lenders shall ascertain the position of aggregate
exposure based on information available either with them, or Central Repository of
Information on Large Credits (CRILC database or declaration obtained from the
borrower.
requirements.object: aggregate exposure based on information available either with them, or Central Repository of Information on Large Credits (C

requirements.full_sentence:
Borrowers who fail to obtain LEI codes from an authorised Local Operating Unit (LOU)
shall not be sanctioned any new exposure nor shall they be granted renewal /
enhancement of any existing exposure.
requirements.object: exposure nor shall they be granted renewal / enhancement of any existing exposure

requirements.full_sentence:
However, Departments / Agencies of Central
and State Governments (not Public Sector Undertakings registered under Companies
Act or established as Corporation under the relevant statute) shall be exempted from
this provision.
requirements.object: provision

requirements.full_sentence:
A UCB shall encourage large borrowers to obtain LEI for their parent entity as well as
all subsidiaries and associates.
requirements.object: obtain LEI for their parent entity as well as all subsidiaries and associates

requirements.full_sentence:
In India, LEI code may be obtained from Legal Entity Identifier India Ltd
(LEIIL), a subsidiary of the Clearing Corporation of India Limited (CCIL), which has
been recognised by the Reserve Bank as issuer of LEI under the Payment and
Settlement Systems Act, 2007 and is accredited by the GLEIF as the Local Operating
Unit (LOU) in India for issuance and management of LEI.
requirements.object: Entity Identifier India Ltd (LEIIL), a subsidiary of the Clearing Corporation of India Limited (CCIL), which has been recognise

requirements.full_sentence:
After obtaining LEI code, a UCB shall also ensure that borrowers renew the codes as
per GLEIF guidelines.
requirements.object: renew the codes as per GLEIF guidelines

requirements.full_sentence:
A UCB shall be guided by the following aspects while formulating a policy on valuation
of properties and appointment of valuers:
requirements.object: following aspects while formulating a policy on valuation of properties and appointment of valuers:

requirements.full_sentence:
Policy for valuation of properties
(1) A UCB shall have a Board approved policy in place for valuation of properties
including collaterals accepted for their exposures.
requirements.object: policy in place for valuation of properties including collaterals accepted for their exposures

requirements.full_sentence: (2) The valuation shall be done by professionally qualified independent valuers i.e.
requirements.object: qualified independent valuers i

requirements.full_sentence: the valuer shall not have a direct or indirect interest.
requirements.object: indirect interest

requirements.full_sentence:
(3) A UCB shall obtain minimum two Independent Valuation Reports for properties
valued at ₹50 crore or above.
requirements.object: Valuation Reports for properties valued at ₹50 crore or above

requirements.full_sentence:
Revaluation of bank's own properties
In addition to the above, a UCB may keep the following aspects in view while
formulating policy for revaluation of their own properties:
(1) As a UCB is permitted to include revaluation reserves as part of Capital in
terms of Reserve Bank of India (Urban Co-operative Banks - Prudential
Norms on Capital Adequacy) Directions, 2025, it is necessary that revaluation
reserves represent true appreciation in the market value of the properties and
banks have in place a comprehensive policy for revaluation of fixed assets
owned by them.
requirements.object: in view while formulating policy for revaluation of their own properties: (1) As a UCB is permitted to include revaluation

requirements.full_sentence:
Such a policy shall inter alia cover procedure for identification
of assets for revaluation, maintenance of separate set of records for such
assets, the frequency of revaluation, depreciation policy for such assets,
policy for sale of such revalued assets etc.
requirements.object: for identification of assets for revaluation, maintenance of separate set of records for such assets, the frequency of reva

requirements.full_sentence:
The policy shall also cover the
disclosure required to be made in the 'Notes on Account' regarding the details
of revaluation such as the original cost of the fixed assets subject to
revaluation and accounting treatment for appreciation / depreciation etc.
requirements.object: required to be made in the 'Notes on Account' regarding the details of revaluation such as the original cost of the fixed as

requirements.full_sentence:
(2) As the revaluation shall reflect the change in the fair value of the fixed asset,
the frequency of revaluation shall be determined based on the observed
volatility in the prices of the assets in the past.
requirements.object: the fair value of the fixed asset, the frequency of revaluation shall be determined based on the observed volatility in the pric

requirements.full_sentence:
Further, any change in the
<image>
method of depreciation shall reflect the change in the expected pattern of
consumption of the future economic benefits of the assets.
requirements.object: the expected pattern of consumption of the future economic benefits of the assets

requirements.full_sentence:
A UCB shall
adhere to these principles meticulously while changing the frequency of
revaluation / method of depreciation for a particular class of asset and shall
make proper disclosures in this regard.
requirements.object: meticulously while changing the frequency of revaluation / method of depreciation for a particular class of asset and shall

requirements.full_sentence:
Policy for Empanelment of Independent valuers
(1) A UCB shall have a procedure for empanelment of professional valuers and
maintain a register / record of 'approved list of valuers'.
requirements.object: empanelment of professional valuers and maintain a register / record of 'approved list of valuers'

requirements.full_sentence: (2) A UCB may prescribe a minimum qualification for empanelment of valuers.
requirements.object: for empanelment of valuers

requirements.full_sentence: Different qualifications may be prescribed for different classes of assets (e.g.
requirements.object: classes of assets (e

requirements.full_sentence:
While prescribing the
qualification, a UCB shall take into consideration the qualifications prescribed
under Section 34AB (Rule 8A) of the Wealth Tax Act, 1957.
requirements.object: qualifications prescribed under Section 34AB (Rule 8A) of the Wealth Tax Act, 1957

requirements.full_sentence:
A UCB shall also be guided by the relevant Accounting Standard issued by the
Institute of Chartered Accountants of India.
requirements.object: the relevant Accounting Standard issued by the Institute of Chartered Accountants of India

requirements.full_sentence:
It may be noted that under the provisions of Section 23 of the SARFAESI
Act, every transaction of security interest s required to be filed with the Registry.
requirements.object: the provisions of Section 23 of the SARFAESI Act, every transaction of security interest s required to be filed with the Registry

requirements.full_sentence:
Current Accounts, Cash Credit Accounts (CC), and Overdraft Accounts (OD) may
all be used as transaction accounts by the customers, which raises concerns relating
to credit monitoring by the lenders.
requirements.object: transaction accounts by the customers, which raises concerns relating to credit monitoring by the lenders

requirements.full_sentence:
Explanation (1): 'Banking System' for the purpose of this Chapter shall include
Commercial Banks (including Small Finance Banks, Local Area Banks, and Regional
Rural Banks, but excluding Payments Banks), Urban Co-operative Banks and Rural
Co-operative Banks (State Co-operative Banks and Central Co-operative Banks).
requirements.object: Small Finance Banks, Local Area Banks, and Regional Rural Banks, but excluding Payments Banks), Urban Co-operative

requirements.full_sentence:
Explanation (2): 'Exposure' for the purpose of this Chapter means the sum of all
sanctioned fund-based credit facilities and non-fund-based facilities availed by the
borrower from the banking system.
requirements.object: sanctioned fund-based credit facilities and non-fund-based facilities availed by the borrower from the banking system

requirements.full_sentence:
Explanation: 'Collection Account' for the purpose of this Chapter means a current
account or OD account used primarily for receipts of cash inflows of the
accountholder.
requirements.object: OD account used primarily for receipts of cash inflows of the accountholder

requirements.full_sentence:
Restricted payments / cash outflows from such account shall be
subject to the conditions outlined in paragraph 51F of these Directions.
requirements.object: conditions outlined in paragraph 51F of these Directions

requirements.full_sentence:
With a view to ensuring credit discipline, lenders may include additional covenants
as per their policies in their loan agreements in mutual agreement with borrowers.
requirements.object: per their policies in their loan agreements in mutual agreement with borrowers

requirements.full_sentence:
A bank may provide such cash credit facilities as per the needs of the
customer, without any restriction under this Chapter.
requirements.object: facilities as per the needs of the customer, without any restriction under this Chapter

requirements.full_sentence:
A bank may maintain current account or OD account without any restriction in case
of customers where the aggregate exposure of the banking system to the customer
is less than ₹10 crore.
requirements.object: OD account without any restriction in case of customers where the aggregate exposure of the banking system to the customer

requirements.full_sentence:
Funds credited into a collection account shall be remitted within two working days
of receipt of such funds to a CC account, current account, or OD account maintained
with any bank in the banking system and designated by the borrower for this purpose
<image>
(hereinafter referred to as 'designated account' in this Chapter).
requirements.object: working days of receipt of such funds to a CC account, current account, or OD account maintained with any bank in the banking s

requirements.full_sentence:
Any disbursement of
overdraft limit from an OD account, which is in the nature of a collection account, shall
be through the designated account only.
requirements.object: account only

conditions: Provided that statutory dues such as taxes
requirements.full_sentence:
Provided that statutory dues such as taxes, and dues, if any, to the bank maintaining
the collection account may be debited before remitting the funds.
requirements.object: taxes, and dues

requirements.full_sentence:
The restrictions placed in terms of paragraph 51D(1) of these Directions shall not
be applicable to the accounts mentioned below:
(1) Accounts opened as per the provisions of Foreign Exchange Management Act,
1999 (FEMA) and notifications issued thereunder, including accounts mandated
for ensuring compliance under the FEMA framework.
requirements.object: accounts mentioned below: (1) Accounts opened as per the provisions of Foreign Exchange Management Act, 1999 (FEMA) and notificat

requirements.full_sentence:
Provided that banks operating the above-mentioned exempted accounts shall ensure
that transactions in such accounts are used only for the permitted / specified
purposes.
requirements.object: such accounts are used only for the permitted / specified purposes

requirements.full_sentence:
Surplus funds, if any, in such accounts shall be remitted to the designated
account.
requirements.object: designated account

requirements.full_sentence:
For the purpose of ensuring ongoing compliance with this Chapter, all banks shall
monitor accounts maintained with them on a regular basis, and in any case at least
once every half-year.
requirements.object: them on a regular basis, and in any case at least once every half-year

requirements.full_sentence:
then the bank shall notify the customer(s) concerned promptly, and in any case within
one month from the date of observing such ineligibility, that the account must either
be converted to a collection account or closed.
requirements.object: promptly, and in any case within one month from the date of observing such ineligibility, that the account must eithe

requirements.full_sentence:
The conversion or closure process, as
the case may be, shall be completed within three months of observing such
ineligibility.
requirements.object: months of observing such ineligibility

requirements.full_sentence:
Accounts opened in terms of these Directions shall be appropriately flagged in the
bank's core banking solution (CBS) to ensure clear identification and to facilitate
effective monitoring.
requirements.object: the bank's core banking solution (CBS) to ensure clear identification and to facilitate effective monitoring

requirements.full_sentence:
Banks maintaining multiple accounts for a borrower shall ensure
that such accounts and transactions and cashflows therein are monitored at the
borrower level as also at the account level.
requirements.object: and transactions and cashflows therein are monitored at the borrower level as also at the account level

requirements.full_sentence:
A bank shall ensure that an accountholder utilise their account solely for
transactions related to their authorised business or activities.
requirements.object: utilise their account solely for transactions related to their authorised business or activities

requirements.full_sentence:
These accounts shall
not, under any circumstances, be used as pass-through channels for facilitating third-
party transactions.
requirements.object: be used as pass-through channels for facilitating third- party transactions

requirements.full_sentence:
Provided that entities expressly licensed or authorised by a financial sector regulator
to facilitate third-party transactions may continue to do so.
requirements.object: authorised by a financial sector regulator to facilitate third-party transactions may continue to do so

requirements.full_sentence:
However, such activities
shall strictly be limited to the specific transactions they are authorised to do and shall
not extend beyond that scope.
requirements.object: the specific transactions they are authorised to do and shall not extend beyond that scope

requirements.full_sentence:
Any account that has been permitted to carry out such
third-party transactions shall be appropriately flagged in the bank's CBS to ensure
clear identification and to facilitate effective monitoring.
requirements.object: the bank's CBS to ensure clear identification and to facilitate effective monitoring

requirements.full_sentence:
A bank shall ensure that an accountholder, who is not licensed or authorised by
the Reserve Bank to accept deposits or to provide payment services, do not engage
in such activities through accounts maintained with them.
requirements.object: who is not licensed or authorised by the Reserve Bank to accept deposits or to provide payment services, do not engage i

requirements.full_sentence:
Robust monitoring systems shall be implemented to detect the above prohibited
usage, including mechanisms to flag accounts exhibiting unusually high transaction
volumes, frequent pass-through activities, or inconsistencies between the
accountholder's stated line of business and transactions carried out through the
account.
requirements.object: the above prohibited usage, including mechanisms to flag accounts exhibiting unusually high transaction volumes, frequent pas

requirements.full_sentence:
Term loans sanctioned by the bank shall preferably be remitted directly to the
intended beneficiary's account(s) or for the specified end-use, where such beneficiary
is identifiable, rather than routing the funds through the borrower's account.]
<image>
requirements.object: to the intended beneficiary's account(s) or for the specified end-use

requirements.full_sentence:
In the case of borrowers enjoying working capital credit limits of ₹10 crore and above
from the banking system, the loan component shall normally be 80 per cent and the
remaining Cash Credit component.
requirements.object: cent and the remaining Cash Credit component

requirements.full_sentence:
UCBs have been given freedom to change the
composition of working capital by increasing the cash credit component beyond 20
per cent or increase the loan component beyond 80 per cent, as the case may be,
if they so desire.

A UCB shall appropriately price each of the two components of
working capital finance, taking into account the impact of such decisions on their
cash and liquidity management.
requirements.object: the two components of working capital finance, taking into account the impact of such decisions on their cash and liquidit

requirements.full_sentence:
In the case of borrowers with working capital (fund based) credit limit of less than
₹10 crore, a UCB shall persuade them to go in for the Loan System by offering an
incentive in the form of lower rate of interest on the 'loan component' as compared
to the 'cash credit component' The actual percentage of 'loan component' in these
cases shall be settled by the UCB with its borrower clients.
requirements.object: in for the Loan System by offering an incentive in the form of lower rate of interest on the 'loan component' as compared to the '

requirements.full_sentence:
The release of ad hoc / additional credit for meeting temporary requirements
shall be considered by the financing UCB only after the borrower has fully
utilised / exhausted the existing limit.
requirements.object: financing UCB only after the borrower has fully utilised / exhausted the existing limit

requirements.full_sentence:
Further, timely
and comprehensive review / renewal of credit facilities shall be an integral part
of the Board approved loan policy and credit risk management framework, and
a UCB shall avoid frequent and repeated ad-hoc / short review / renewal of
credit facilities without justifiable reasons.
requirements.object: of the Board approved loan policy and credit risk management framework, and a UCB shall avoid frequent and repeated ad-hoc / short

requirements.full_sentence:
Moreover, the processes
governing review / renewal of credit facilities shall be brought under the scope
of concurrent / internal audit / internal control mechanism of the UCB with
immediate effect.
requirements.object: scope of concurrent / internal audit / internal control mechanism of the UCB with immediate effect

requirements.full_sentence:
In respect of consortium lending, the level of individual bank's share in Cash
Credit and Loan Component shall be governed by the norm for single / group
borrowers' credit exposure.
requirements.object: norm for single / group borrowers' credit exposure

requirements.full_sentence:
The minimum period of the loan for working capital purposes shall be fixed by a
UCB in consultation with borrowers.
requirements.object: UCB in consultation with borrowers

requirements.full_sentence:
A UCB shall decide to split the loan
component according to the need of the borrower with different maturity bases
for each segment and allow roll over.
requirements.object: loan component according to the need of the borrower with different maturity bases for each segment and allow roll over

requirements.full_sentence: Bills limit for inland sales shall be fully carved out of the 'loan component'.
requirements.object: of the 'loan component'

requirements.full_sentence: A UCB shall satisfy themselves that the bills limit is not mis-utilised.
requirements.object: bills limit is not mis-utilised

requirements.full_sentence:
A UCB shall lay down policy guidelines for periodic review of the working capital
limit and the same shall be scrupulously adhered to.
requirements.object: for periodic review of the working capital limit and the same shall be scrupulously adhered to

requirements.full_sentence:
The Directions, instructions and guidelines already
repealed shall continue to remain repealed.

Notwithstanding such repeal, any action taken or purported to have been taken, or
initiated under the repealed Directions, instructions, or guidelines shall continue to
be governed by the provisions thereof.
requirements.object: by the provisions thereof

requirements.full_sentence:
All approvals or acknowledgments granted
under these repealed lists shall be deemed as governed by these Directions.
requirements.object: by these Directions
affect: (1) any right, obligation or liability acquired, accrued, or incurred thereunder

requirements.full_sentence:
and
any such investigation, legal proceedings or remedy may be instituted,
continued, or enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may be
imposed as if those directions, instructions, or guidelines had not been repealed.
requirements.object: enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may be imposed as if those directions, instructions, or guideline

requirements.full_sentence:
The provisions of these Directions shall be in addition to, and not in derogation of
the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time being
in force.
requirements.object: and not in derogation of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time being in force

requirements.full_sentence:
For the purpose of giving effect to the provisions of these Directions or in order to
remove any difficulties in the application or interpretation of the provisions of these
<image>
Directions, the Reserve Bank may, if it considers necessary, issue necessary
clarifications in respect of any matter covered herein and the interpretation of any
provision of these Directions given by the Reserve Bank shall be final and binding.
